Subject : [Incident] Labionexus platform unavailable · {{INCIDENT_ID}}

Hello {{CLIENT_NAME}},

We detected at {{INCIDENT_TIME_UTC}} UTC a P1 incident that makes the Labionexus platform partially or fully unavailable.

Observed impact : {{IMPACT_SUMMARY}}

Actions in progress :
1. The technical team is working on service restoration.
2. The Labionexus Boxes continue to capture data locally and will sync automatically as soon as the platform is back online.
3. No action is required from you on the instrument side.

No data loss is expected thanks to the write-ahead log embedded on the Box.

You can follow the situation at {{STATUS_PAGE_URL}}.

Next communication checkpoint : {{ETA_NEXT_UPDATE}} UTC.

Best regards,
{{FOUNDER_NAME}}
Labionexus
